title: event — field classification
description: Event carries commercial + scheduling reference data. No PII on the Event row itself; participant PII arrives via inbound FK from Wave 3 athlete-enrollment. Bulk of compliance responsibility: financial-record retention (entry_fee / late_fee / prize_pool changes), SOC 2 CC6.3 change tracking (EventCancellationBroadcast + EventRescheduled + EventVenueChanged), and child-safeguarding advance-notice for events with minor registrants.

regulated_minor: Event.age_group_ids (when the referenced groups target minors — Wave 3+ AgeGroup module confirms via age_min/age_max)
audit_log: Event.starts_at (every change post-announced -> audits, warn severity when post-registration_open)
Event.ends_at (every change post-announced -> audits, warn severity when post-registration_open)
Event.branch_id (every change post-registration_open -> audits, warn severity via EventVenueChanged)
Event.entry_fee_cents (every change -> audits, critical severity when post-registration_open, 7-year retention)
Event.min_age (every narrowing post-registration_open -> audits, critical when excludes registrants)

notes: Event.description supports up to 4000 chars — public when visibility=public, internal otherwise. Response redactor applies visibility filter at wire time.
Event.private_notes NEVER surfaces on public wire. Admin surfaces only.
Event.livestream_password is confidential — never rendered on any wire surface; delivered exclusively via secure email + push (not in-app render).
Event.sponsors is an internal-tier JSONB array on the wire; renders publicly on the event detail page when visibility=public.
EventCancellationBroadcast is the highest-severity operational event — every fire generates a mandatory audit row + cannot-opt-out notification to every registered participant + guardian for minors.

For events with minor registrants (any Event with min_age<=17 or age_group targeting minors), regulatory framework (US state childcare regs, UK Ofsted, EU child-protection directives) require advance notice on schedule changes — EventRescheduled + EventVenueChanged + EventCancellationBroadcast all CC guardians when minors are registered.
